case_title: STEPHEN RANDALL MASSEY et al VS. YAN ANNE CHEN

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MASSEY, STEPHEN RANDALL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY MASSEY, STEPHEN RANDALL MACDONALD, MONTANA CADENCE CHEN, YAN ANNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASSEY, STEPHEN RANDALL MACDONALD, MONTANA CADENCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEN, YAN ANNE DEFENDANT ENTITLED TO ONE MONTH'S RENT FROM EACH PLAINTIFF AS DEFENDANT TOOK REASONABLE STEPS TO MITIGATE RENT LOSS GIVEN EXPECTATION OF LONGER TENANCY BY PLAINTIFF'S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED FEB-27-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, YAN ANNE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,450.00 FILED BY MASSEY, STEPHEN RANDALL MACDONALD, MONTANA CADENCE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, YAN ANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
